summary: Applied the round-3 material fixes by hard-blocking reviewer pre-validation failures, enforcing runtime enum validation in the shared parser, and moving review artifact persistence after effective verdict finalization.
highlights: Reviewer pre-validation failures now escalate through BoardBlockedError.
Shared parser validates verdict, severity, fix-decision, and leader status enums at runtime.
review.json is now emitted after effective leader verdict and deferred-items are finalized.
